title: SunPower Bankruptcy: What Customers Need to Know
text: SunPower Corporation filed for bankruptcy on August 5, 2024 citing mounting debt and operational challenges. Company had installed solar systems on over half million American homes. Enphase Energy positioned as key solution provider for affected customers honoring warranty terms for Enphase microinverters used in SunPower systems and ensuring product availability for warranty claims. Over 2,500 SunPower customers switched to Enphase monitoring following bankruptcy with Enphase offering options ranging from system monitoring, service plans to full system upgrades. Warranty burden fell on manufacturers across U.S., Singapore, South Korea, Italy, Austria and India covering 25 years of product warranty claims for SunPower-installed systems. SunPower installations frequently used Enphase microinverters and Maxeon solar panels with both companies planning to honor respective manufacturer warranties.
